facts.text: Case subject: valve assembly VA-575, version v1, under acceptance check.
The job card lists acceptance standard edition AS-2019 for this case.
The governing contract row for this case class lists acceptance standard edition AS-2024.
The inspector applied the edition listed on the job card exactly; the step log matches it.
Under the applied edition the case PASSES; the margin sheet notes 0.2 units to the limit of the contract-listed edition.
The draft completion statement records acceptance with no note about editions.
